about.disclaimer: Full transparency: I don't build everything entirely from scratch writing every line of code manually. I make extensive and intelligent use of AI platforms like GitHub Copilot, ChatGPT, and Claude to iterate faster, tackle complex problems, and dramatically elevate the quality of my final results. I know how to guide AI to build robust solutions.
